documents.title: # 📋 Eatlytic: Executive Summary  ## 🎯 Core Vision Eatlytic is a **WhatsApp-first, AI-powered food label scanner** built exclusively for India. It reads nutrition labels **without barcodes**, supports **10+ Indian languages**, and delivers **personalized health scores** based on clinical personas (diabetic, child, pregnant, athlete, senior, general adult). It turns confusing packaging into instant, trustworthy dietary guidance.  ---  ## 🛡️ The Unfair Moat (Why It Wins) | Differentiator | Why It Matters | |----------------|----------------| | **Barcode-free scanning** | Covers 40% of Indian products (kirana/local brands) that barcode apps miss | | **Persona-based scoring** | Same product = different scores for different health conditions (medically grounded) | | **WhatsApp-native distribution** | Zero install friction, works on ₹5K phones, viral in family groups | | **Indian language OCR + FSSAI/WHO rules** | Solves real linguistic & regulatory gaps global apps ignore | | **Data flywheel** | Every scan → verified product → faster/cheaper scoring → more users → harder to copy |  ---  ## ⚙️ Technical Architecture (Hybrid Intelligence) - **OCR Pipeline:** Image preprocessing (CLAHE, deblur, crop) → Multi-language OCR (EasyOCR → PaddleOCR → Custom) → Nutrient parsing - **Scoring Engine:** Rule-based logic handles **60-80% deterministically** (free, consistent, transparent). LLM fallback chain (Groq → Gemini → Together) handles edge cases. - **Trust Layer:** Atwater calorie validation, multi-signal confidence scoring, transparent red/green flags, mandatory legal disclaimers - **Backend:** FastAPI + Supabase PostgreSQL + Docker → HuggingFace Spaces → self-hosted VPS → fine-tuned models  ---  ## 💰 Business Model & Unit Economics - **Consumer:** Freemium (10 scans) → ₹199/month Pro (unlimited, family profiles, history, alternatives) - **B2B API:** ₹999–4,999/month for health apps, retailers, insurers, corporate wellness - **Affiliate:** 4-8% commission on healthier alternatives - **Breakeven:** **5 paying users** (~₹995/month) covers ₹970 VPS cost. Fully bootstrapped. - **Target Month 12:** ₹1.25–1.45L/month (500 Pro users + 5 B2B clients + affiliate)  ---  ## 🗺️ Path to AI Independence (18-Month Roadmap) | Phase | Timeline | Independence | Key Action | |-------|----------|--------------|------------| | **1. Dependent** | Months 1-3 | 0% | Free APIs, rule engine, WhatsApp bot, product cache | | **2. Hybrid** | Months 4-6 | 70% | Self-host Ollama, migrate to VPS, rule engine handles 60% | | **3. Provider** | Months 7-12 | 90% | PaddleOCR, on-device ML Kit, 80% rule-based, 5K+ cached products | | **4. Platform** | Months 13-18 | 99% | Fine-tuned proprietary model, B2B API scale, data licensing |  ---  ## 📊 Execution & Risk Management - **North Star Metric:** `Scan-2 Rate` (% who scan a 2nd product). <30% = fix core experience. >40% = scale. - **Key Risks & Mitigations:**   - ❌ Inaccurate scan goes viral → Confidence scores, disclaimers, "Verified" badge only for consistent results   - ❌ Founder burnout → 20 hrs/week max, don't quit job until ₹50K/mo for 3 months   - ❌ API dependency → Rule engine + cache handles 80% before scaling LLMs   - ❌ Low willingness to pay → WhatsApp freemium proves value first, convert 2-5% - **Rule of Thumb:** Data > Code. Trust > Features. Retention > Acquisition.  ---  ## 🚀 Immediate Next Steps (₹0 Blueprint) 1. **Week 1:** Deploy MVP on HuggingFace, fix payment/OCR/confidence bugs, seed 50 products 2. **Week 2-3:** Launch WhatsApp bot, track Scan-2 Rate, collect accuracy feedback 3. **Week 4:** Onboard 100 users, measure retention, iterate based on real usage data 4. **Month 2-3:** Integrate Razorpay, launch Pro tier, pitch 3 B2B pilots, migrate to VPS  ---  ### 🔑 Bottom Line Eatlytic isn't a barcode scanner. It's **India's first nutrition intelligence layer** that works for how Indians actually shop, speak, and eat. The tech is commodity; the **data moat, persona logic, and WhatsApp distribution** are defensible. With ₹0 infrastructure for 3 months, breakeven at 5 users, and a clear 18-month independence roadmap, it's a lean, fundable, YC-calible venture. **Ship fast, measure Scan-2 Rate, let data dictate features.**
